name: Welders
description: Diesel engine-driven welding generators for pipeline construction, fabrication, and maintenance work.

machines.shortDescription: Heavy-duty diesel engine-driven welding generator for pipeline construction and fabrication. CC/CV output with auxiliary power.
machines.description: Heavy-duty diesel engine-driven welding generator for pipeline construction and fabrication. CC/CV output with auxiliary power. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

features: 400A welding output at 100% duty cycle
20 kW auxiliary power for tools

machines.name: Miller Bobcat 250 Engine-Driven Welder/Generator
machines.shortDescription: Engine-driven welder/generator delivering 250A DC welding output with 10,000W auxiliary generator power. Kohler-powered workhorse for stick, TIG, and wire welding on remote job sites.
machines.description: Engine-driven welder/generator delivering 250A DC welding output with 10,000W auxiliary generator power. Kohler-powered workhorse for stick, TIG, and wire welding on remote job sites. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Output Studs: CC and CV for wire feeder connection

machines.name: Lincoln Electric Vantage 300 Engine-Driven Welder
machines.shortDescription: Diesel engine-driven 300A multi-process welder with 11,000W generator. Lincoln Chopper Technology for smooth arc control in stick, TIG, and flux-cored welding.
machines.description: Diesel engine-driven 300A multi-process welder with 11,000W generator. Lincoln Chopper Technology for smooth arc control in stick, TIG, and flux-cored welding. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Welding Processes: Stick (SMAW), DC TIG (GTAW), Flux-Cored (FCAW), Arc Gouging

features: Lincoln Chopper Technology delivers arc stability unmatched by SCR-based machines
300A with 11,000W auxiliary — weld structural steel while powering the job site
Kubota diesel engine with 68 L tank runs 14+ hours between fuel stops
Rated for arc gouging up to 6 mm carbon rods for demolition and repair
510 kg weight with integrated lifting eye for crane placement on-site
CC/CV selector switch enables seamless switching between stick and wire

machines.name: ESAB Rebel EMP 215ic Multiprocess Welder
machines.shortDescription: Multi-process inverter welder handling MIG, stick, and DC TIG at 215A. Dual-voltage 120/230V with sMIG technology for plug-and-play operation on any site.
machines.description: Multi-process inverter welder handling MIG, stick, and DC TIG at 215A. Dual-voltage 120/230V with sMIG technology for plug-and-play operation on any site. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Technology: IGBT inverter with sMIG automatic mode

features: sMIG technology auto-tunes voltage and wire speed — set material thickness and weld
Dual-voltage auto-sensing handles 120V generator or 230V mains without rewiring
Weighs 18 kg in a carry-friendly chassis — one-man portable across the job site
IGBT inverter draws 30% less input current than transformer-based machines
True multi-process: change gun and cable to switch from MIG to TIG in minutes
IP23S rated for outdoor use in dusty conditions common on UAE construction sites

machines.name: Kemppi MinarcTig 250 TIG Welder
machines.shortDescription: Professional TIG welder with 250A output, HF ignition, and pulse capability. Kemppi Finnish engineering for precision stainless steel, aluminum, and thin-gauge welding.
machines.description: Professional TIG welder with 250A output, HF ignition, and pulse capability. Kemppi Finnish engineering for precision stainless steel, aluminum, and thin-gauge welding. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

Pulse capability from 0.2-300 Hz for controlling heat input on thin materials

19 kg in a rugged Kemppi case with integrated carry handle and cable storage
3-phase 400V input delivers stable arc even on generator power with voltage fluctuation
MinarcTig arc control software adapts to electrode type and joint configuration

machines.name: Fronius TransPocket 150 Stick Welder
machines.shortDescription: Ultra-portable 150A stick welder at 4.7 kg with Fronius resonance inverter technology. The go-to MMA machine for maintenance, site repair, and pipe root pass welding.
machines.description: Ultra-portable 150A stick welder at 4.7 kg with Fronius resonance inverter technology. The go-to MMA machine for maintenance, site repair, and pipe root pass welding. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

Anti-Stick circuit detects electrode short and drops current to prevent damage

IP23 rated — tolerates rain, dust, and site conditions that kill lesser machines
